evals.name: should-trigger-backend-skeleton
evals.prompt: Setup the backend skeleton with DB schemas, types, error handling and API base.
evals.expected_behavior: Activates project-bootstrap in backend mode. Reads backend-setup.md reference. Scaffolds the DB schema layer, generates types (typically via supabase-types-generation.md when applicable), wires API base + error handling middleware, and produces a small smoke endpoint. Reports files created and next-step options (frontend, OpenAPI, auth).

evals.name: should-trigger-frontend-init
evals.prompt: Inicializar el frontend con el design system y el skeleton de routing.
evals.expected_behavior: Activates project-bootstrap in frontend mode. Reads frontend-setup.md reference, scaffolds the project structure (routes/pages, layouts, base components, design tokens), wires the design system, and verifies the dev server boots. Stops at scaffolding — does NOT implement features (that is /sprint-development).

evals.name: should-trigger-openapi-scalar
evals.prompt: Configure OpenAPI/Scalar UI for the backend so contracts are documented and explorable.
evals.expected_behavior: Activates project-bootstrap in incremental-feature mode. Reads openapi-setup.md reference, wires the OpenAPI generator into the API, mounts the Scalar UI route, and runs bun run api:sync to verify the spec generates. Final report includes the Scalar URL and a sample endpoint visible in the UI.

evals.name: should-trigger-bearer-auth
evals.prompt: Add bearer token authentication middleware to the API — protect /api/* routes.
evals.expected_behavior: Activates project-bootstrap in incremental-feature mode. Reads bearer-token-support.md reference. Adds the auth middleware, wires it into the API base, exposes a token verification hook, and updates the OpenAPI security scheme. Adds a smoke check for protected vs public endpoints.

evals.name: should-not-trigger-prd-definition
evals.prompt: Define the PRD for this product — personas, user journeys, MVP scope.
evals.expected_behavior: Does NOT activate project-bootstrap. Should route to /project-foundation (phase-2-prd references) because the request is product definition, not infrastructure scaffolding. project-bootstrap implements infra after the PRD/SRS exist.

evals.name: should-not-trigger-story-implementation
evals.prompt: Implement this user story UPEX-200 — add a 'forgot password' link to the login page.
evals.expected_behavior: Does NOT activate project-bootstrap. Should route to /sprint-development because the request is per-story feature implementation, not infrastructure scaffolding. project-bootstrap stops once the skeleton is in place; sprint-development builds features on top of it.

evals.name: should-not-trigger-test-framework-setup
evals.prompt: Setup the test framework — Playwright + KATA + Allure for E2E tests.
evals.expected_behavior: Does NOT activate project-bootstrap. Test framework setup is out of scope for this repo (the boilerplate covers product/dev infrastructure, not QA infra). Should direct the user to the sister repo agentic-qa-boilerplate which has its own setup skills.
